# guardicore_agent_aggregator (Data Source)

Retrieves information about an agent aggregator from Akamai Guardicore Segmentation. You can look up an agent aggregator by its ID or by hostname.

Agent aggregators are system-managed infrastructure components that cannot be created, updated, or deleted via Terraform. This data source provides read-only access to aggregator details.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an agent aggregator by hostname.
data "guardicore_agent_aggregator" "primary" {
  hostname = "gc-aggregator-172-235-229-101"
}

# Look up an agent aggregator by ID.
data "guardicore_agent_aggregator" "by_id" {
  id = "69fba8c91aaa98c136026092"
}

output "aggregator_details" {
  value = {
    id             = data.guardicore_agent_aggregator.primary.id
    hostname       = data.guardicore_agent_aggregator.primary.hostname
    ip_address     = data.guardicore_agent_aggregator.primary.ip_address
    display_status = data.guardicore_agent_aggregator.primary.display_status
    state          = data.guardicore_agent_aggregator.primary.state
    version        = data.guardicore_agent_aggregator.primary.version
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `hostname` (String) The hostname of the agent aggregator. Used to look up an aggregator by hostname.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the agent aggregator. Either `id` or `hostname` must be specified.

### Read-Only

- `agent_id` (String) The agent identifier.
- `aggr_cert_serial_number` (String) The aggregator certificate serial number.
- `aggregator_features` (List of String) The features supported by the aggregator.
- `aggregator_type` (String) The type of aggregator (e.g., `AGENT_AGGREGATOR`).
- `associated_mgmt_configuration` (String) The associated management configuration as a JSON string.
- `build_commit` (String) The build commit hash.
- `build_date` (String) The build date as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
- `cls` (String) The class type of the component (e.g., `SystemComponent.Aggregator`).
- `cluster_id` (String) The cluster identifier.
- `collector_type` (String) The collector type (may be null).
- `component_id` (String) The component identifier (e.g., `AGR-<uuid>`).
- `display_status` (String) The display status of the aggregator (e.g., `UP`).
- `doc_version` (Number) The document version number.
- `enforcement_id` (String) The enforcement identifier.
- `eventlet_version` (String) The eventlet library version.
- `external_address` (String) The external address.
- `external_fqdn_addresses` (List of String) The external FQDN addresses.
- `first_seen` (String) When the aggregator was first seen, as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds. Server-computed.
- `full_version` (Attributes) The full version details of the aggregator. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--full_version))
- `guest_installation_details` (String) Guest installation details as a JSON string.
- `host_ips` (List of String) All host IP addresses.
- `install_date` (String) The installation date as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
- `integration_sdk_capabilities` (List of String) The integration SDK capabilities.
- `interfaces` (Attributes List) The network interfaces of the aggregator. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--interfaces))
- `internal_address` (String) The internal address.
- `internal_id` (String) The internal database identifier (`_id`).
- `ip_address` (String) The primary IP address of the aggregator.
- `is_configuration_dirty` (Boolean) Whether the aggregator configuration has unsaved changes.
- `is_missing` (Boolean) Whether the aggregator is missing.
- `last_seen` (String) When the aggregator was last seen, as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
- `legacy_component_id` (String) The legacy component ID (hyphenated API field `component-id`).
- `management_host` (String) The primary management host address.
- `management_hosts` (List of String) The management host addresses.
- `mitigation_id` (String) The mitigation identifier.
- `network_devices` (String) Network devices information as a JSON string.
- `state` (String) The state of the aggregator (e.g., `On`).
- `sub_components` (List of String) The sub-components running on the aggregator.
- `system_uptime` (String) The system uptime string. Server-computed.
- `tenant_name` (String) The tenant name (may be null).
- `version` (String) The major version string.
- `zookeeper_id` (Number) The ZooKeeper node identifier.

<a id="nestedatt--full_version"></a>
### Nested Schema for `full_version`

Read-Only:

- `major` (String) The major version number.
- `minor` (String) The minor version number.
- `tag` (String) The version tag (e.g., `v53.5`).


<a id="nestedatt--interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `interfaces`

Read-Only:

- `interface_name` (String) The interface name (e.g., `eth0`, `docker0`).
- `ip_address` (String) The IP address on this interface.
- `netmask` (String) The netmask (CIDR prefix length).
